title: Resuming War Is a Short-Term Political Boon for Netanyahu, but Grim Choices Await
summary_full: If President Trump forces Israel to stand down against Iran, analysts say, it could leave Israel hindered from responding forcefully to attacks by Hezbollah.
summary_public: If President Trump forces Israel to stand down against Iran, analysts say, it could leave Israel hindered from responding forcefully to attacks by Hezbollah.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: President Trump forces Israel to stand down
